title: May Sponsor Roundup

body:
1. Elle's Studio // 2. Simon Says Stamp // 3. Amykathryn save 15% with the code: AMYT15 //              4. Blue Bird Chic offering free shipping all over the world using the code: SPRINGFREE2012 //         5. Studio Calico // 6. Baby Bird & Bub Bub save 15% with the code: AMYTANFAN // 7. Liz Lamoreux

Hope you will get around to checking out these wonderful creative partners.

Washi Tape Kit by Rhonna Designs.
